title: All Simple Voice Chat Connections!
description: 🎤｜See all All Simple Voice Chat Connections!
body:
[![Sparked Host](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1330912431496495165/1490018985675198534/Artboard_2-1.png?ex=69d287d1&is=69d13651&hm=fa99fc9a0f45b09a7ef09ae91ba8f79d8cd7e3b1a06fd73b17010a9561bbfad1&)](https://billing.sparkedhost.com/aff.php?aff=3220)

# 💻 Downloads > **We are only on modrinth (for now)** [![modrinth](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/33ee01197a4d521e02d4372ad14c55f03c30f14d.png)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/simple-voice-chat-connections!/versions) --- # 🎙️ All Simple Voice Chat Connections! > **Everything you could ever want for Simple Voice Chat — in one modpack.** > A complete collection of addons, integrations, and quality-of-life mods built around Simple Voice Chat. Whether you want Discord bridging, TTS, soundboards, pitch shifting, replay recording, or just player names above heads — it's all here, ready to go. --- ## ⚡ What's included? - 🎙️ **Full Simple Voice Chat setup** with all major addons and integrations - 🤖 **Discord bridge** — relay in-game voice to a Discord channel - 🔊 **Soundboards & Audio Player** — play custom sounds and audio in-game - 📝 **Text-to-Speech** — converts chat messages to voice automatically - 🎬 **Replay Mod + Voice recording** — record and replay sessions with audio - 🎚️ **Pitch Shifter** — change your voice pitch in real time - 👥 **Enhanced Groups, Spectator VC, Player Names** and more QoL addons - 🚀 **Performance base** with Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore and Iris --- ## 📦 Included Mods ### 🎙️ Voice Chat Core & Addons | Mod | Purpose | |-----|---------| | **Simple Voice Chat** | The core proximity voice chat mod | | **Replay Voice Chat** | Records voice chat alongside Replay Mod | | **Voice Chat Discord** | Bridges in-game voice to Discord | | **Voice Messages** | Send recorded voice messages in chat | | **TalkingHeads** | Animates player heads while speaking | | **SVC Player Names** | Shows player names while they speak | | **Voicechat Names** | Alternative player name display above heads | | **Enhanced Groups** | Improved voice chat group management | | **Global Spectator VC** | Voice chat support for spectator mode | | **Wiretap** | Record and monitor voice chat sessions | | **TTVoice** | Integrates Twitch chat TTS with voice chat | | **SVC TTS** | Text-to-speech for Simple Voice Chat | | **Pitch Shifter** | Real-time voice pitch shifting | ### 🔊 Audio & Soundboards | Mod | Purpose | |-----|---------| | **Audio Player** | Play custom audio files in-game | | **Open Soundboard** | Open-source soundboard for voice chat | | **Simple Soundboard** | Lightweight soundboard addon | | **Soundboard** | Additional soundboard integration | ### 🎬 Recording | Mod | Purpose | |-----|---------| | **Replay Mod** | Record and replay game sessions | ### 🔧 Performance | Mod | Purpose | |-----|---------| | **Sodium** | Massive FPS boost via optimized renderer | | **Lithium** | Optimizes game logic (AI, physics, chunks) | | **FerriteCore** | Drastically reduces RAM usage | | **Entity Culling** | Skips rendering entities outside view | | **Iris Shaders** | Shaderpack support | ### 🛠️ Interface & Libraries | Mod | Purpose | |-----|---------| | **Mod Menu** | In-game mod list and settings | | **Cloth Config** | Config API for mods | | **Fabric API** | Essential base for all Fabric mods | | **Fabric Language Kotlin** | Kotlin support for mods | | **Owo Lib** | UI and utility library | | **Cristel Lib** | Utility library | | **Placeholder API** | Placeholder support for HUD mods | --- ## 🖥️ Requirements | | Info | |---|---| | **Minecraft** | 1.21.11 | | **Loader** | Fabric 0.18.6 | | **RAM** | 3 GB allocated recommended | | **Java** | Java 21 | --- ## 👤 Created by **EdonMe Studios** Lead Dev: **SlibJpg** ---
